title: LLMUsageReconciled
description: F008 reconciled billing event derived from a FOCUS line item. Cost in integer USD minor units (1 unit = 0.01 USD). One event per (tenant, provider, model, period_start, period_end, billing_account_id) tuple.

source_event_id.description: Stable handle for the originating FOCUS line item. Format: focus:<billing_account_id>:<period_start>:<period_end>:<service_name>.

source.description: Always exporter for reconciled events (source is upstream llm-usage-exporter /focus.json).

model.description: Canonical model name. May be empty when the FOCUS line item is provider-level rather than model-level.

billing_account_id.description: FOCUS BillingAccountId (the provider-side account). Opaque to the platform.

invoice_id.description: FOCUS InvoiceId when the line item is finalized.

reconciled_cost_usd_minor_units.description: Billed cost in USD minor units (1 unit = 0.01 USD), summed across line items in the period.

list_cost_usd_minor_units.description: List/pre-discount cost in USD minor units. Optional; reflects FOCUS ListCost when available.

pricing_currency.description: Three-letter pricing currency from the original FOCUS record (USD if amount is reconciled to USD).

reconciled_at.description: When the ingester wrote the canonical record.
